r64_trust_scorelean_softcov.description: Iter2 trust-map rebalance: shift alpha mapping toward score signal (less covariance-dominant), keep SCD and per-state alpha multipliers unchanged.
r64_trust_scorelean_softcov.rationale: New 1x-mainline direction: instead of ultra-low gating, retune trust-map shape so selected-state feedback is decided more by x/sqrt(P) and less by pure covariance shrink.

round64_extra_patch.name: r64_trust_scorelean_softcov
round64_extra_patch.description: Iter2 trust-map rebalance: shift alpha mapping toward score signal (less covariance-dominant), keep SCD and per-state alpha multipliers unchanged.
round64_extra_patch.rationale: New 1x-mainline direction: instead of ultra-low gating, retune trust-map shape so selected-state feedback is decided more by x/sqrt(P) and less by pure covariance shrink.

r64_trust_span_up.description: Iter2 trust-map contrast increase: slightly lower floor and larger span while softening covariance contribution.
r64_trust_span_up.rationale: Checks whether a wider trust-map dynamic range can improve dKg_xx/max without touching the Round61 SCD cadence or ultra-low branch logic.

round64_extra_patch.name: r64_trust_span_up
round64_extra_patch.description: Iter2 trust-map contrast increase: slightly lower floor and larger span while softening covariance contribution.
round64_extra_patch.rationale: Checks whether a wider trust-map dynamic range can improve dKg_xx/max without touching the Round61 SCD cadence or ultra-low branch logic.

r64_cov_sched_static_meas_plus.description: Iter2 covariance/measurement schedule rebalance: slightly more selected-state process mobility and slightly stronger static/late measurement weight.
r64_cov_sched_static_meas_plus.rationale: Orthogonal mainline test: leave trust-map structure mostly intact and probe a tiny Q/R schedule rebalance to improve calibration on 1x.

round64_extra_patch.name: r64_cov_sched_static_meas_plus
round64_extra_patch.description: Iter2 covariance/measurement schedule rebalance: slightly more selected-state process mobility and slightly stronger static/late measurement weight.
round64_extra_patch.rationale: Orthogonal mainline test: leave trust-map structure mostly intact and probe a tiny Q/R schedule rebalance to improve calibration on 1x.

r64_combo_trust_cov_narrow.description: Narrow combo: mild trust-map score-lean + mild iter2 Q/R schedule rebalance in one deterministic patch.
r64_combo_trust_cov_narrow.rationale: Carefully combined route to test whether trust-map and schedule adjustments can cohere on 1x without the Round62/63 ultra-low gate path.

round64_extra_patch.name: r64_combo_trust_cov_narrow
round64_extra_patch.description: Narrow combo: mild trust-map score-lean + mild iter2 Q/R schedule rebalance in one deterministic patch.
round64_extra_patch.rationale: Carefully combined route to test whether trust-map and schedule adjustments can cohere on 1x without the Round62/63 ultra-low gate path.

no_winner_reason: No Round64 candidate produced a clean no-regression 1x improvement over Round61 on the main weighted target set.
